<!--
  Title format: Conventional Commit, scoped to the package you touched.
  Examples: fix(core): ..., feat(adapter-expo-updates): ..., docs(sink-http): ...
  Please keep the headings below and fill in each section.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What is broken or missing? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Solution

<!-- What does this PR change, and why this approach? -->

## Testing

<!-- What did you run, and on which platform(s)? Unit tests, example app, manual steps. -->

## New Dependencies

None

<!-- If not "None": name each new dependency and justify why it is needed and why it cannot be a peer dependency. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Issue opened/linked for non-trivial changes
- [ ] One concern per PR
- [ ] Typecheck, lint, tests, and build pass locally
- [ ] Changeset added for user-facing changes
- [ ] TSDoc on any new exported symbols
